message: 🌱 Add istio: K8s: Using common labels with namespace 'app.kubernetes.io'  mission (#495)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-10724-k8s-using-common-labels-with-namespace-app-kubernetes-io",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: K8s: Using common labels with namespace 'app.kubernetes.io' ",
+    "description": "K8s: Using common labels with namespace 'app.kubernetes.io' . Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\nThere are [common labels](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/common-labels) for K8s and Helm [recommends](https://github.com/helm/helm/blob/master/docs/chart_best_practices/labels.md) using these:\n\n-"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for K8s: Using common labels with namespace 'app.kubernetes.io' ",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nistio_labels:\r\n  app_label_name: \"app.kubernetes.io/name\"\r\n  version_label_name: \"app.kubernetes.io/version\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"K8s: Using common labels with namespace 'app.kubernetes.io' \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "istio_labels:\r\n  app_label_name: \"app.kubernetes.io/name\"\r\n  version_label_name: \"app.kubernetes.io/version\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
